name: Critical Engine
reqs: critical_engine := 30r LHT OR 30r MED OR 30r HVY, 90s INT
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that applies the effects of your held Deep Gem to your weapon critical. This does not consume the Deep Gem on use. Blue Gems have a unique interaction with this Talent, granting Ether back based on scaled damage dealt.
desc: You gain the ability to use Deep Gems on your critical attack. Hold out the Deep Gem you wish to apply to your crit then use the tool to enhance your critical.
